summary: WIN-010 c5 H3 (major) — stale Section 1.8 cross-reference. EXP-220 rewrites the cross-reference paragraph to use current Section 1.8 title ("The Coordinate Collapse") and current framing (Polaris-angle contamination through n(r) medium, 300–6000× Earth atmosphere refractivity). Threads the needle post-FSF-correction: FSF = H(r)/r is conceded as geometric scaling, and Section 1.8 is used to argue the r values that scaling feeds on are themselves contaminated by the dome n(r) medium. All five c5 issues (ISS-1390/1391/1392/1393/1394) resolved by the single EXP-220 patch. Please integrate and close.
